programme.title: Little Singham
programme.desc: Little Singham, an honest but ferocious police officer, fights against injustice. S01E71.

programme.title: Little Singham
programme.desc: The kids are scared after learning about the school being haunted. S01E72.

programme.title: Society Mai Bunder-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo helps his mischievous monkey friend return home after the town complaints increase. S03 E19.

programme.title: Dumb Wish-Haddi Mera Buddy
programme.desc: While cleaning, Billy finds a lamp in Grim's trunk and releases Grim's mother from it.

programme.title: Bunty Billa Aur Babban
programme.desc: Bunty, Billa and Babban engage in mischievous behaviour and create trouble for each other. S02 E26.

programme.title: Bunty Billa Aur Babban
programme.desc: Bunty, Billa and Babban engage in mischievous behaviour and create trouble for each other. S02 E27.

programme.title: Bunty Billa Aur Babban
programme.desc: Bunty, Billa and Babban engage in mischievous behaviour and create trouble for each other. S02 E28.

programme.title: Bunty Billa Aur Babban
programme.desc: Bunty, Billa and Babban engage in mischievous behaviour and create trouble for each other. S02 E29.

programme.title: Bunty Billa Aur Babban
programme.desc: Bunty, Billa and Babban engage in mischievous behaviour and create trouble for each other. S02 E30.

programme.title: Fukrey Boyzzz
programme.desc: When Murti sir is unable to find his glasses, the gang decide to find it through Choocha's dreams. S01 E42.

programme.title: Naagsingham aur Sarpkaal Ka Vaar
programme.desc: Little Singham confronts numerous challenges as he courageously faces an adversary.

programme.title: Little Singham: Samudra Kaal Se Sangram
programme.desc: Little Singham battles a powerful adversary to protect the ocean ecosystem.

programme.title: Little Singham Aur Tanashah Se Takkar
programme.desc: Bringing the best in television.

programme.title: Yudhkaal
programme.desc: Little Singham must save his parents from the evil clutches of Kaal.

programme.title: Ek Aur Ek Gyarah-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo discovers the 3Bs gang's plot to rob Lucky Home Society and decides to stop them. S03E20.

programme.title: Detention-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Dr J shares his evil idea of using the detention room to do away with Kris.

programme.title: Think Tankmaan Ki Awaaz-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Kanishk accidently gets hit on the head and gets the power to hear people's thoughts.

programme.title: Detention-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Dr J shares his evil idea of using the detention room to do away with Kris.

programme.title: Eeks For Elephant-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Kanishk plans to disguise Kris as a missing baby elephant and ship him off to the circus.

programme.title: Video Villain-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: The money offered by a game show causes the kids to start pranking each other on camera.

programme.title: Statue-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: The minions are reminded of their childhood as see the children play.

programme.title: Not Friends Anymore-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Kris is asked to make a choice between Bablu and Pinky after their conflict.

programme.title: Yeh Kya Ho Raha Hai-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Kris' friends learn that Tarak and Kanishk have disguised Chatur Chalbaaz as Kris.

programme.title: Titoo Ki Bachat-Titoo
programme.desc: Tito's mother instructs everyone to follow measures in order to save electricity. S07E03.

programme.title: Titoo Aur Bulb Chor-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's family discover that everyone's bulb from the balcony has been stolen. S07E04.

programme.title: Powerful Shera-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera becomes very powerful after accidentally consuming the wrong drink. S07E05.

programme.title: Katrina Ka Replacement-Titoo
programme.desc: Katrina is fired, and a robot house help is hired in her place. S07E06.

programme.title: Bahadur Ki Bahaduri-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble. S07E07.

programme.title: World Animal Day-Titoo
programme.desc: Tito brings a donkey to school in order to challenge his teacher. S07E08.

programme.title: Titoo Ka Cousin Neemku-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's assignment to speak kindly is put to the test when his blunt cousin arrives. S07E09.

programme.title: Purani Almari-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble. S07 E10.

programme.title: Organic Holi-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo and his friends play Holi, but accidentally spray red colour on Mrs Chatterjee. S07E12.

programme.title: Jodi No 1-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo accidentally gets glue on his uniform and causes chaos at home. S07E13.

programme.title: Mummy Chor-Titoo
programme.desc: When their mother gets stolen, Titoo and his brother make a plan to get her back. S07E15.

programme.title: Classical Dance Teacher-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo finds himself in a comedic situation involving a classical dance instructor. S07E16.

programme.title: Dosti Mein Darar-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble. S07 E17.

programme.title: Golden Hair-Titoo
programme.desc: When his father gets concerned about his hair fall, Titoo comes up with a solution. S07 E01.

programme.title: Titoo Ki Yoga Class-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo helps a yoga teacher who lost his land after being deceived by his student. S07E18.

programme.title: Samunder Ke Lootere Sheher Me-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble. S07 E19.

programme.title: Baatuni Aunty Ki Batein-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble. S07 E20.

programme.title: Bus Hijack-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo uses a smartwatch to save his classmates after two robbers hijack their school bus. S07E21.

programme.title: Titoo Ka Cctv-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo sees camera footage of his neighbour getting kidnapped. S07E22.

programme.title: Ganna Ka Gift-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's kindness to an elderly woman backfires, leaving him giftless for Ganna's birthday. S02 E01.

programme.title: Secretary Memory Loss-Titoo
programme.desc: When the building secretary plays a game of cricket with Titoo, he suffers an accident. S02 E02.

programme.title: Titoo Bana Tower-Titoo
programme.desc: When Titoo gets accidentally hit by the light of a magical torch, he grows very tall. S07 E02.

programme.title: Titoo: Robot ka Bawandar
programme.desc: Titoo harnesses the capabilities of a robot to confront a powerful adversary.

programme.title: Anokhi Game-Titoo
programme.desc: The children discover a mysterious game board among Pasha the magician’s things. S07E11.

programme.title: Papa Ka Laptop-Titoo
programme.desc: After breaking their father's laptop, Golu and Titoo scramble to mend it. S02 E03.

programme.title: Titoo Vs Shark-Titoo
programme.desc: At the aquarium waterpark, a jealous Shera isolates Titoo with rumours. S02 E04.

programme.title: Papa Aur Secretary Ka Jhagda-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo and his friends attempt to talk sense into the feuding elders and restore peace. S02 E05.

programme.title: Titoo Chori Ho Gaya-Titoo
programme.desc: Thieves steal Titoo's family car when he is fast asleep in it. S02 E06.

programme.title: Papa Ki Neend-Titoo
programme.desc: After Titoo's father falls ill from inhaling fumes, Titoo and Golu must work in his place. S02 E07.

programme.title: Parents Competition-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera and Titoo's friendly bet turns chaotic during a parents' sports day. S02 E08.

programme.title: Baal Baal Bache-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's neighbours face eviction by a group of swindlers, prompting him to help them. S02 E09.

programme.title: Titoo Ki Bachat-Titoo
programme.desc: Tito's mother instructs everyone to follow measures in order to save electricity. S07E03.

programme.title: Titoo Aur Bulb Chor-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's family discover that everyone's bulb from the balcony has been stolen. S07E04.

programme.title: Scaredy Bean-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: A frightened Bean embarks on a bizarrely petrifying adventure along with Mr. Tiny. S01E38.

programme.title: Wanted-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mistaken for an escaped convict who looks like him, Bean is carted off to jail. S01E40.

programme.title: Gadget Kid-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr. Bean forms an unexpected friendship with a Japanese boy at the science museum. S01E41.

programme.title: The Visitor-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Harry visits Bean, eats all his food, leaves the fridge empty and stuns Bean. S01E42.

programme.title: Big TV-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean uses his resourceful side by inventing an alternative to modern entertainment. S01E43.

programme.title: Keyboard Capers-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr. Bean buys a piano to learn, but gets a self-playing keyboard from his teacher. S01E44.

programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E86.
